name: Pearl Dome Table Lamp
shortDescription: Rounded accent lamp with a soft pearl finish
description: A rounded pearl-tone table lamp that brings soft ambient light to shelves, bedside tables, and console corners. Its calm shape works well with modern decor and cozy rooms.

name: Tripod Table Lamp
shortDescription: Tall tripod lamp with warm wood detail
description: A tall tripod lamp with a clean shade and warm wooden legs. It adds useful task lighting to offices, study desks, and reading corners without feeling heavy.

name: Black Bow Side Table
shortDescription: Black Bow Side Table
description: Add a touch of playful elegance and modern artistry to your home with our Sculptural Black Bow Side Table. This eye-catching piece features a striking design where the base is shaped like a delicate, stylized bow or ribbon, crafted from smooth, high-gloss black metal or durable molded resin. The dark finish provides a sophisticated contrast to the light it reflects, turning the table into a functional piece of sculpture. The circular top offers a practical surface for holding drinks, books, or a small lamp. Perfect for placing beside a sofa or armchair, this side table instantly elevates the chic factor of any contemporary living space.

name: Bamboo Storage Basket
shortDescription: Handwoven basket for natural storage
description: Embrace natural organization with our Handwoven Bamboo Storage Basket. Crafted from sustainably sourced bamboo, this basket features a tightly woven construction that offers both durability and natural beauty. The light, neutral tones and distinct texture of the bamboo introduce an organic, calming element to any room. Equipped with sturdy, integrated handles for easy transport, this versatile basket is perfect for a wide range of uses—from holding laundry and storing blankets in the living room to organizing toys or magazines. Its timeless design ensures it complements rustic, bohemian, and modern minimalist decor styles alike.

name: Red Tray Side Table
shortDescription: Bright red tray table for work corners
description: A slim red tray table that adds a clean pop of colour beside a desk, reading chair, or sofa. The raised edge keeps drinks, books, and small decor pieces neatly in place.

name: Luxury Sofa
shortDescription: white luxury sofa
description: Introducing the epitome of refined comfort and stately design: our Opulent Luxury Sofa. This masterpiece of seating is crafted for the discerning homeowner, combining breathtaking aesthetics with unparalleled comfort. Upholstered in sumptuously soft, high-grade [Mention fabric, e.g., velvet, Italian leather, or bespoke chenille], the sofa features deep, hand-tufted cushions and elegantly rolled or streamlined arms, providing a look that is both timeless and grand. The structure rests on finely detailed, solid [Mention material, e.g., mahogany or polished brass] legs, adding a layer of subtle glamour. Designed to be the undisputed focal point of any high-end living space, this sofa delivers a seating experience that defines true luxury and enduring style.

name: White Drawer Unit
shortDescription: White Drawer Unit
description: Organize your space with effortless style using our Streamlined White Drawer Unit. This practical and aesthetically pleasing storage solution features a crisp, matte white finish that brightens any room while offering versatile storage for clothing, office supplies, or household clutter. Built with a sturdy frame and smooth, gliding drawers, this unit is designed for daily durability and ease of use. Its clean lines and minimalist design allow it to fit seamlessly beneath a desk or stand alone as a simple, modern chest, making it an essential piece for maximizing organization in bedrooms, offices, or craft rooms.

name: Loveseat Sofa
shortDescription: grey love seat sofa
description: Meet the perfect marriage of comfort and compact style with our Grey Loveseat Sofa. Upholstered in a soft, durable fabric in a sophisticated shade of grey, this piece is designed to seamlessly blend into any contemporary or traditional decor scheme, from minimalist apartments to cozy dens. Ideal for smaller living spaces, the loveseat comfortably seats two people without sacrificing luxurious feel. Featuring plush, generously padded cushions and supportive armrests, it offers a welcoming spot for relaxing, reading, or enjoying a quiet evening. The neutral grey hue ensures versatility, easily complementing bold accent colors or

name: Cozy Sofa
shortDescription: cozy sofa
description: Sink into pure relaxation with our Ultimate Cozy Sofa, specifically designed for unparalleled comfort. Upholstered in an incredibly soft, textured [Mention fabric, e.g., chenille, brushed microfibre, or lambswool-like] fabric, this sofa is built to be your personal haven. It features deeply-filled, overstuffed cushions and a generous, low profile that invites lounging, napping, and movie marathons. The casual, welcoming design prioritizes softness and sink-in comfort, making it the perfect centerpiece for a relaxed living room or family space where maximum comfort is key.

name: Petite Bedside Lamp
shortDescription: Small lamp for bedside tables and shelves
description: A compact bedside lamp made for small corners, nightstands, and shelves. It gives a gentle glow without taking up too much space.

name: Ivory Accent Pillow
shortDescription: Soft ivory cushion for sofas and beds
description: A soft ivory accent pillow with a clean, neutral look. It layers easily with patterned cushions and brings a comfortable finish to sofas or beds.

name: Grey Reading Armchair
shortDescription: Comfortable grey armchair for reading corners
description: A relaxed grey armchair with a deep seat and soft cushion support. It is made for quiet reading corners, living rooms, and cozy spaces that need one comfortable statement seat.

name: Light Beige Pillow
shortDescription: Neutral pillow for fresh bedroom styling
description: A soft light beige pillow for fresh bedding and relaxed seating. The neutral shade layers easily with white sheets, warm throws, and modern bedroom styling.

name: Noir Round Side Table
shortDescription: Slim black side table for sofa corners
description: A minimal black side table with a round tray top and slim legs. It works beautifully next to sofas, accent chairs, or reading corners.

name: Serene Bedroom Chair
shortDescription: Soft accent chair for bedroom corners
description: A calm bedroom accent chair with light upholstery and generous cushioning. Ideal for a vanity corner, reading space, or quiet morning routine.

name: Ivory Tufted Accent Chair
shortDescription: Elegant ivory accent chair with tufted back
description: A soft ivory tufted accent chair that brightens living rooms and bedrooms. The rounded shape, padded back, and wooden legs make it comfortable for reading corners or calm lounge spaces.

name: Retro Steel Toaster
shortDescription: Polished toaster for modern kitchens
description: A sleek toaster with a polished finish and easy controls. It is compact, reliable, and designed to sit neatly on any kitchen counter.

name: Minimal Work Desk
shortDescription: Clean desk for study and office spaces
description: A minimal desk with a dark tabletop and sturdy profile. It gives you a focused work surface for laptops, notebooks, and home-office essentials.

name: Black Round Office Table
shortDescription: Slim round table for office corners
description: A slim black round table that works well beside a desk or office chair. It gives you a tidy spot for coffee, notebooks, or a small plant without taking over the room.

name: Ribbed Glass Accent Lamp
shortDescription: Glass and gold lamp for shelves and sideboards
description: A ribbed glass accent lamp with a warm gold base. It adds a soft glow to sideboards, bedside tables, and display shelves while keeping the look polished.
